comment: Synthetic advanced/recurrent endometrial serous carcinoma, p53-abnormal (TCGA copy-number-high subtype), pMMR, female 68. Plan target IND-ENDOMETRIAL-ADVANCED-1L-DOSTARLIMAB-CHEMO (RUBY: dostarlimab+carbo+pacli). Drift: ALGO-ENDOMETRIAL-ADVANCED-1L step 1 uses free-text 'dMMR / MSI-high tumor' as the dostarlimab branch trigger, so engine routes pMMR p53-abn cases to default IND-ENDOMETRIAL-ADVANCED-1L-PEMBRO-CHEMO. Drift acknowledged — RF authoring (RF-ENDOMETRIAL-DMMR / molecular-subtype routing) and broader p53-abn / RUBY-Part-2-style routing tracked separately.
